/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/infer_demo.dir/cpp_onnx_infer_example.cpp.o  -o infer_demo   -L/usr/local/onnxruntime/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/onnxruntime/lib -lonnxruntime libdp_policy.a libdp_planner.a libdp_infer.a /usr/local/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.so libdp_policy.a -lonnxruntime /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so
